shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package manifests ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'package.json' -g 'next.config.*' -g 'tsconfig.json' -g 'src/**' -g 'app/**' -g 'pages/**' | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- app/page.tsx ---' && sed -n '1,260p' app/page.tsx && printf '%s\\n' '--- app/layout.tsx ---' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '%s\\n' '--- all source refs ---' && rg -n \"post|cache|revalidate|unstable_cache|use server|tag\" app . --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!package-lock.json'"'"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- app/page.tsx app/actions.ts lib/posts.ts && git status --short'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && find app lib -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort && printf '\\n--- action/cache references ---\\n' && rg -n \"updateTag|unstable_cache|tags|createPost\" app lib"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
